name: Lemon Whipped Cream Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and shortening with 1 cup sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add lemon peel and vanilla; mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, mixing after each addition. Set aside.
5. Beat egg whites in a clean bowl until soft peaks form.
6. Gradually add the remaining sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the cream base.
8. Divide the batter evenly among 3 greased and waxed paper-lined 9-inch round cake pans.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack.
11. For the filling, combine sugar and flour in a saucepan over medium heat. Gradually add milk, cooking and stirring until thickened and bubbly.
12. Cook for an additional 2 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla, lemon juice, and zest. Cover and let cool.
13. Gently fold in the whipped cream and spread between each layer of cake, as well as on top.
14. Chill before serving.
